description: Verify plan parsing extracts slice headers and scope contract from a sample plan

setup.cmd:
node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('docs/plans',{recursive:true}); require('fs').writeFileSync('docs/plans/test-plan.md','# Test Plan
## Scope Contract
MUST do X
## Slice 1 — Setup
Build the thing
## Slice 2 — Validate
Test the thing')"
